name: ALFA Holding Group
description: Alfa Holding Group was established in 2006 as a new generation of AlMabrouk Group, which has been operating in the oil and gas sector since 1959. Headquartered in Libya with subsidiaries in Tunisia, Egypt and United Arab Emirates, Alfa Holding Group is active in the following sectors: Healthcare and Cosmetics, Real Estate, Building Materials, Financial Services, Electrical, Engines, Energy Services, and Electronic Payment Services.
